name: meta
description: Meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace: four skills — plugin-dev (a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace: repo layout, Claude + Codex dual manifests, version discipline, what makes a plugin/skill worth installing), skill-authoring (how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean), marketplace-health (check that an installed marketplace is on the latest version and has auto-update enabled), and enable-autoupdate (turn that auto-update on) — plus a SessionStart hook that surfaces a marketplace-health banner at session start. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.
